ai_summary: Nestlé India Limited has declared a Special Dividend of Rs. 2 per equity share, totaling approximately Rs. 3.86 billion, to be paid on July 30, 2026. This significant distribution will be funded from retained earnings, specifically from a balance reclassified from the General Reserve following a 2023 Scheme of Arrangement. While providing a direct cash return to shareholders, this payout represents a strategic utilization of previously reserved capital rather than a direct distribution of recent operational profits, though no immediate financial red flags are apparent.
